utterance:
{
  "utterance": "With the power of AI, we can revolutionize rural healthcare by providing remote consultations and personalized health plans for every villager in India. This is not just an app; it is a mission to bring healthcare to the last mile.",
  "title": "AarogyaSathi: Remote Healthcare for Rural India",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "AarogyaSathi leverages AI to provide remote healthcare services, addressing the severe healthcare disparity in rural areas. It ensures that every villager, regardless of location, can access quality healthcare.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "This isn't just an app; it's a digital cathedral that reconnects people with their divine purpose. Yeezus.",
  "title": "Yeezus",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "Yeezus merges spirituality, technology, and art into a single, immersive experience that elevates users to a higher plane of existence.",
  "your_role": "Spiritual Leader and Creative Director"
}

{
  "utterance": "Revolutionizing global food distribution to reduce waste and increase access to fresh produce for everyone, especially in underserved communities.",
  "title": "FreshFlow",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "FreshFlow leverages IoT sensors and predictive analytics to optimize supply chains, ensuring fresher produce reaches consumers faster and reducing waste by up to 50%. This addresses the critical social issues of food accessibility and sustainability.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "In a world where digital detoxes are trendy, we offer a platform that forces users to disconnect, revealing the depths of human connection and vulnerability. This is not a social media app; it's a ritual of presence and truth.",
  "title": "Presence Ritual",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "The project challenges users to engage in uncomfortable, yet meaningful, interactions that foster deeper human connections and self-awareness, addressing themes of social isolation and the value of authentic human interaction.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}
